The '''derkolo''' were quick and aggressive pack hunters that dwelled on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sileron]], in the [[Veron Minor system/Legends|Veron Minor system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. They were one of the more common predators on Sileron. They were aggressive and individual creatures seemed to have no fear of [[Death/Legends|death]]. They consumed large quantities of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] in preparation for the long [[Winter/Legends|winter]]. In the colder seasons, they hibernated in large burrows; some related species migrated to other other continents on the warmer side of the world.
